title: Dark-theme animated frontend developer portfolio (React + Tailwind + Framer Motion)

requirements.summary: Create a single-page dark, neon-accented, glassmorphism-based futuristic portfolio UI with smooth hover interactions.
acceptanceCriteria: App uses a consistent dark palette with the specified background values (or extremely close equivalents) across all sections.
Cards/containers use a glassmorphism style (blur + translucent fill + subtle border) that remains readable on dark backgrounds.
Interactive elements (buttons, links, cards) have smooth hover states and subtle glow accents without harming contrast/readability.

file_operations.description: Create the single-page layout shell (hero/about/skills/projects/experience/contact/footer) and apply the dark futuristic structure (glassmorphism surfaces, neon accents, hover interactions). Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Button/Card-like primitives if available) to keep consistent UI building blocks. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Create a reusable layout wrapper that provides the dark base background, glass surface framing, consistent spacing, and shared effects layers (glow, overlays) used across all sections.
Create a reusable glassmorphism card/container wrapper (blur, translucent background, subtle border) to standardize the visual style for project cards, skill cards, timeline items, etc.
Create a reusable neon-accent link/button wrapper class setup (hover glow, focus ring, underline/outline interactions) for consistent interactions across the site.

requirements.summary: Configure Tailwind and global CSS for dark theme tokens, neon/glow utilities, glassmorphism helpers, custom scrollbar, and a subtle noise overlay.
acceptanceCriteria: Tailwind is configured with reusable theme tokens/utilities for dark surfaces, neon accents, glow shadows, and glassmorphism styling.
A custom scrollbar style is applied globally and matches the dark theme.
A subtle grain/noise effect is visible (and not overpowering) across the site.

file_operations.description: Extend Tailwind theme with neon accent colors (cyan/purple/electric-blue), glow boxShadow presets, and convenience tokens for dark surfaces and glass effects (while keeping existing shadcn-style CSS variable color mapping intact).

Add global styles: dark background base (close to #0f0f0f/#0b0b0b), smooth scrolling, custom dark scrollbar, and a subtle noise/grain overlay using the static asset frontend/public/assets/generated/noise-texture.dim_1024x1024.png (no backend usage).
Create a reusable overlay component that renders the noise/grain texture layer and can be toggled/opacity-tuned for readability using frontend/public/assets/generated/noise-texture.dim_1024x1024.png.

requirements.summary: Add a global Framer Motion animation system with centralized variants, scroll reveals, section transitions, and an initial loader animation.
acceptanceCriteria: Motion variants are centralized and reused across sections (not duplicated ad hoc everywhere).
Scroll-based reveal animations trigger once per section/element and feel smooth on mobile and desktop.
A loader animation is displayed briefly on first load and then cleanly transitions to the hero section.

file_operations.description: Centralize Framer Motion variants (fade/slide/scale/stagger, section reveal presets, hover/tap micro-interactions) to ensure reuse across all sections.
Create a reusable scroll-reveal wrapper based on Framer Motion that triggers once per element/section (IntersectionObserver-based) and supports direction/amount presets via centralized variants.
Create an initial loader animation (Framer Motion) shown on first app load, then animate out into the hero section.
Wire the centralized motion variants, wrap sections with Reveal components, and include the PageLoader that transitions into the hero content.

requirements.summary: Implement a responsive navbar with smooth in-page scrolling and hide/show behavior based on scroll direction, including mobile navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar contains links to all required sections and scrolls smoothly to anchors/sections.
On downward scroll the navbar animates out; on upward scroll it animates back in.
Navbar is usable and visually correct on mobile/tablet/desktop (including a mobile-friendly navigation pattern).

file_operations.description: Create a small hook to detect scroll direction (up/down) with thresholding to avoid jitter and to drive navbar hide/show animation.

Create the responsive navbar with section links (Hero/About/Skills/Projects/Experience/Contact), smooth scrolling behavior, and Framer Motion hide/show animation based on scroll direction. Use shadcn-ui components where appropriate (e.g., Button, Sheet/Drawer for mobile menu if present). Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire the Navbar into the top of the single-page layout and ensure all target sections have stable IDs for anchor scrolling.

requirements.summary: Build the Hero section with cinematic on-load text animation, typing role animation, and animated CTAs for Hire Me and View Projects.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero name text animates in on load (e.g., staggered reveal/slide/blur) with a premium feel.
Role text uses a visible typing effect (type + delete or type only) and loops or completes gracefully.
CTA buttons are animated (hover/tap) and navigate to Contact/Projects sections respectively (or open the relevant section).

file_operations.description: Create a lightweight typing animation hook (type-only or type/delete) used by the hero role text with graceful looping/completion.

Implement the Hero section with large animated name text (cinematic on-load motion), typing role text, and two primary CTAs. Use the generated background image frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png and include the logo mark frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_512x512.png in a subtle brand element.
Wire HeroSection into the page and ensure CTA actions scroll smoothly to the Projects and Contact sections.

requirements.summary: Add magnetic button interactions for primary CTAs and key interactive elements with accessible focus states and touch-safe behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: On desktop, magnetic effect is noticeable but subtle and does not cause layout shift.
On touch devices, the effect does not interfere with tapping (either disabled or simplified).
Keyboard focus states remain clear and usable on all buttons/links.

file_operations.description: Create a utility hook to respect prefers-reduced-motion and to provide a single place to gate cursor/magnetic/parallax intensity.

Create a wrapper component that applies a subtle magnetic attraction effect on pointer move for desktop, disabled/adapted for touch and reduced motion; ensure no layout shift and preserve keyboard focus visibility.
Apply the Magnetic wrapper to the primary CTAs (Hire Me / View Projects) and any other designated primary interactive elements.

requirements.summary: Implement a neon-themed cursor follower with touch fallback and performance-friendly updates.
acceptanceCriteria: A cursor follower element smoothly trails the pointer and visually matches the site theme.
Follower is hidden/disabled on touch devices.
No noticeable lag during normal pointer movement on typical hardware.

file_operations.description: Implement a cursor follower component using performant motion updates (e.g., requestAnimationFrame / Framer Motion values) with neon/glow styling; disable on touch devices and honor reduced-motion preferences.
Mount CursorFollower at the layout level so it covers the whole page without interfering with interactions (pointer-events none) and can be globally toggled.

requirements.summary: Create the About section with animated profile image, scroll-triggered text reveal, and glowing tech stack icons with hover animations.
acceptanceCriteria: Profile image has a tasteful animation (float/parallax/scale) and fits the glass/neon aesthetic.
About text reveals on scroll with a smooth, readable motion (not too fast).
Tech icons animate on hover (e.g., lift/rotate/glow) and remain legible on dark background.

file_operations.description: Implement About section using frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-portrait.dim_800x800.png with a tasteful animation and Reveal-based scroll text. Add a tech stack icon grid with hover glow/motion.
Wire AboutSection into the single-page section flow and ensure it has the correct section ID for navbar scrolling.

requirements.summary: Create the Skills section with scroll-triggered animated progress indicators and glowing icon hover effects.
acceptanceCriteria: Skills animate into view when scrolled into viewport.
Progress indicators animate from 0 to their target values smoothly.
Skill icons have consistent styling and glow hover effects without visual noise.

file_operations.description: Create a reusable progress indicator component (bar and/or circular) that animates from 0 to target when it enters the viewport and can be reused for multiple skills.
Implement Skills section using Reveal wrappers and SkillProgress components; add consistent neon glow hover effects for skill icons.
Wire SkillsSection into the single-page layout and ensure it is reachable via navbar smooth scrolling.

requirements.summary: Create an animated Projects section with glass project cards, hover tilt, overlay links (Live Demo/GitHub), and animated category filtering (React/JS/HTML).
acceptanceCriteria: Projects are displayed as cards with glassmorphism styling and animated entrance/reveal.
Hovering a card shows an overlay with clearly clickable “Live Demo” and “GitHub” links.
Filter chips/buttons animate when changing selection and project grid transitions smoothly between filtered states.
Hover tilt effect is subtle, performant, and disabled/adapted on touch devices.

file_operations.description: Define the local project list (no CMS) with categories (React/JS/HTML), titles/descriptions, and thumbnail paths referencing frontend/public/assets/generated/project-thumb-1.dim_1200x800.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/project-thumb-2.dim_1200x800.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/project-thumb-3.dim_1200x800.png.
Create an animated project card with glassmorphism styling, entrance animation, hover overlay for “Live Demo” and “GitHub”, and a subtle hover tilt effect disabled/adapted on touch devices.

Create animated filter controls for categories (React/JS/HTML). Use shadcn-ui components (e.g., Button/Badge/ToggleGroup equivalents if present) for consistent controls. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Implement Projects section with animated grid transitions when filtering; wire ProjectFilter and ProjectCard together and ensure smooth layout transitions.
Wire ProjectsSection into the page and ensure it has a stable section ID for the navbar and hero CTA scrolling.

requirements.summary: Create an Experience/Education animated timeline section with scroll-triggered reveals and cinematic flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Timeline items animate into view as the user scrolls (e.g., alternating slide-in, line draw).
Layout remains readable and well-spaced on mobile and desktop.
Timeline animations do not cause content reflow jank.

file_operations.description: Define local Experience/Education timeline data (no admin/CMS) with dates, titles, and descriptions.
Create a timeline component with scroll-triggered reveal animations and a premium line/marker visual; keep layout stable to avoid reflow jank.
Implement the Experience/Education section using the Timeline component and Reveal wrappers for cinematic flow.
Wire ExperienceSection into the single-page layout with a proper section ID and navbar link.

requirements.summary: Implement the Contact section with animated form, glow focus inputs, local validation + success state, and animated social icons (no external email services).
acceptanceCriteria: Form fields animate on mount/reveal and show a clear glow focus state on focus.
Basic client-side validation exists (required fields, email format).
Submitting the form shows a success message/state and clears or preserves fields in a predictable way.
Social icons animate on hover and are keyboard accessible.

file_operations.description: Create a contact form hook that manages field state, basic validation (required + email format), submit handling, and a local success state (no backend or third-party integrations).

Implement Contact section with animated form reveal, glow focus states, accessible labels/errors, and social icon links with hover animations. Use shadcn-ui form/input primitives if available to maintain consistent styling. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
Wire ContactSection into the page and ensure the Hero CTA “Hire Me” scrolls here.

requirements.summary: Create a minimal dark футuristic footer with subtle animated text/accent.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer is visually minimal and consistent with the site theme.
Footer text or a small accent element has a subtle animation (not distracting).

file_operations.description: Implement a minimal footer matching the dark neon aesthetic with a subtle Framer Motion animation on a small accent/text element.
Wire FooterSection as the final section of the single-page layout.

requirements.summary: Add a subtle slow-moving animated gradient background that complements the dark base without harming readability.
acceptanceCriteria: Animated gradient is visible yet subtle and does not overpower text/cards.
Gradient animation runs smoothly and does not cause significant performance issues.

file_operations.description: Create an animated gradient background layer (slow movement) tuned for readability behind glass cards; ensure it is subtle and performant.
Mount the AnimatedGradientBackground behind content (and below noise overlay) and ensure it does not reduce contrast for text/cards.

requirements.summary: Add conservative parallax scrolling to select hero/background elements with accessibility-friendly behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Parallax is applied to a small number of elements and enhances depth without distraction.
Motion remains smooth on mobile and desktop; effect is reduced/disabled if needed for performance or accessibility preferences.

file_operations.description: Create a small parallax hook that maps scroll position to transform values with clamping, reduced-motion gating, and touch/mobile safeguards.
Apply conservative parallax to a small number of hero/background elements (e.g., background art layer and a subtle accent) while respecting reduced-motion preference.

requirements.summary: Ensure responsive UX, smooth scrolling, SEO-friendly basics, and a clean reusable component structure with clear comments for non-trivial animations.
acceptanceCriteria: All sections render correctly at common breakpoints (mobile, tablet, desktop) without overflow issues.
In-page navigation uses smooth scrolling.
Page includes basic SEO metadata and semantic structure (e.g., one H1, meaningful section headings).
Components are organized logically (sections/components/hooks), with readable, commented code where animation logic is non-trivial.

file_operations.description: Add basic SEO metadata (meta description) and wire the favicon-style mark using frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_512x512.png.

Ensure semantic landmarks/heading structure (single H1 in hero, meaningful section headings), smooth scrolling behavior, and responsive layout across breakpoints; add targeted comments where animation logic is non-trivial.
Create a reusable Section wrapper to standardize spacing, max-width/container behavior, section IDs for navigation, and accessible headings.

requirements.summary: Add required generated static images under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them from the UI (hero/about/projects/favicon/noise).
acceptanceCriteria: All images listed in imageRequirements.required exist in frontend/public/assets/generated and are referenced by the UI.
Images load efficiently and do not cause layout shifts (dimensions reserved or constrained).
No backend endpoints are used for image delivery.

file_operations.description: Add the generated static asset file to be used as a logo mark and favicon-style browser icon.
Add the generated static asset file to be used in the hero background visuals.
Add the generated static asset file to be used for the subtle grain/noise overlay.
Add the generated static asset file to be used as the animated About profile image.
Add the generated static asset file to be used as a project thumbnail in the Projects section.
Add the generated static asset file to be used as a project thumbnail in the Projects section.
Add the generated static asset file to be used as a project thumbnail in the Projects section.
Reference frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_512x512.png with dimensions constrained to prevent layout shift.
Reference frontend/public/assets/generated/profile-portrait.dim_800x800.png with constrained dimensions/aspect ratio to prevent layout shift.

Reference frontend/public/assets/generated/project-thumb-1.dim_1200x800.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/project-thumb-2.dim_1200x800.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/project-thumb-3.dim_1200x800.png for project thumbnails.
Reference frontend/public/assets/generated/noise-texture.dim_1024x1024.png for the global noise overlay styling and ensure it remains subtle and does not impact readability.
